message:
feat(sql): enable compiled execution by default

- Add decision branch in execute() to route queries to compiled path
- Change compiled_execution_enabled default to true
- Add graceful fallback to interpreted execution on compilation failure
- Fix Zig 0.15.2 API compatibility:
  - ArrayList now unmanaged, requires allocator for append/deinit
  - CallingConvention.c instead of .C
  - Alignment enum for alignedAlloc
  - Add @alignCast for function pointer cast
